title: Dorry Collapses
description: On pages 18–22, dorry collapses as the battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation.
scene: Dorry Collapses. The battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.
